params.SpellDescription: When you next activate an ability that isn't a mana ability this turn by spending four or more mana to activate it, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: When you next activate an ability that isn't a mana ability this turn by spending four or more mana to activate it, copy that ability. You may choose new targets for the copy.

params.Description: You may activate abilities of other creatures you control as though those creatures had haste.
